figures.name: d8_fig1_alphabet_dimension_map
figures.caption: Coverage map: 5 alphabets across SU(2)/SU(4)/SU(8); blue=sub-alphabet/per-qubit density route, amber=T-free CCZ-essential. 7 rows, 2-entry legend.

figures.name: d8_fig2_su8_density_duality
figures.caption: Two SU(8) density mechanisms: Route A (T-based, CCZ over-complete, Phase 6y) vs Route B (T-free, CCZ-essential, Phase 6z); both dense in SU(8); converse banner (Clifford-alone finite).

figures.name: d8_fig3_sk_recursion
figures.caption: Dawson-Nielsen recursion: error contracts as eps0^((3/2)^n) (blue, log y-left) while word length grows N0*5^n (amber, log y-right); honest exponent log5/log(3/2)~3.97.
